name: 反派崩潰獨白型
description: 反派在被揭穿或失敗時的情緒爆發，暴露其真實動機和心理創傷。既讓觀眾解氣，又為角色增加一層深度。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: You've been the lofty young master of the Rome family for so many years. And what about me? I'm the product of your father's affair with my mother... I was forced to live my whole life in the shadows, hiding my identity forever. Why? Just because I'm a bastard, child.
